Name: LOCK_ON_CAMERA_OFFSET_PARAM
Description: Defines camera positioning, tracking behavior, rotation limits, and interpolation settings while the player is locked onto a target.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Camera Adjustment Duration
Fields.Description: Time required for the lock-on camera transition or correction to complete.

Fields.Name: Field of View (Degrees)
Fields.Description: Vertical camera field of view used during lock-on.

Fields.Name: Target Offset: X
Fields.Description: Horizontal offset applied to the camera target point along the X-axis. In metres.

Fields.Name: Target Offset: Y
Fields.Description: Vertical offset applied to the camera target point along the Y-axis. In metres.

Fields.Name: Target Offset: Z
Fields.Description: Depth offset applied to the camera target point along the Z-axis. In metres.

Fields.Name: Target Camera Distance
Fields.Description: Desired distance between the camera and the lock-on target. In metres.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Target Chase Rate (XZ)
Fields.Description: Horizontal tracking responsiveness while locked onto a target. Higher values follow the target more aggressively.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Target Chase Rate (Y)
Fields.Description: Vertical tracking responsiveness while locked onto a target.

Fields.Name: Minimum Chase Rate Angle During Lock-On
Fields.Description: Minimum angle threshold used when calculating target chase responsiveness. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum Chase Rate Angle During Lock-On
Fields.Description: Maximum angle threshold used when calculating target chase responsiveness. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Minimum X Rotation During Lock-On
Fields.Description: Lowest vertical camera rotation angle allowed while locked on. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum X Rotation During Lock-On
Fields.Description: Highest vertical camera rotation angle allowed while locked on. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Rotation Interpolation Start Height
Fields.Description: Target height at which X-axis rotation interpolation begins. In metres.

Fields.Name: Rotation Interpolation End Height
Fields.Description: Target height at which X-axis rotation interpolation finishes. In metres.

Fields.Name: Lock Rotation Chase Rate
Fields.Description: Determines how quickly the camera rotation follows the lock-on target.

Fields.Name: Lock Rotation Dead Zone Angle
Fields.Description: Angular threshold before rotational tracking adjustments begin. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Lock X Rotation Shift Ratio
Fields.Description: Blend ratio applied to X-axis rotation adjustments during lock-on tracking.
